subject: Geology
title: Mary Anning
description: Learn Mary Anning in one minute.

hook.text: A poor girl on an English beach found a sea dragon's skeleton at age 12. She changed paleontology forever.

buildup.text: Mary Anning discovered ichthyosaurs, plesiosaurs, and pterosaurs along the cliffs of Lyme Regis, England.

discovery.text: Her finds proved that species could go extinct, a radical idea at the time that shook religious certainties.

twist.text: Male scientists published her discoveries under their own names. She received almost no formal credit in life.

climax.text: Today Anning is recognized as one of the most important fossil hunters in history, long after her death.

punchline.text: She found monsters and changed the world.

quiz.question: What did Mary Anning's discoveries prove?
